creator: ady@freebsd.ady.ro
text:
Hi,

  Here goes another patchset against 4-stable after locale names
"MFCization". I have adapted the file names to conform to the new locale
naming scheme.

  Please note when importing/committing that there is a new file
created by the patchset:

    share/timedef/ro_RO.ISO8859-2.src

  In the short time period since the initial submit I have used the
proposed ro_RO locale and had no trouble with it. In fact I had some
pleasant surprises (mostly about date/time formatting) :) .

 Thank you,
 Ady (@warpnet.ro)
_______________________________________________________________________
| Programming in BASIC causes brain damage.                           |
|   (Edsger Wybe Dijkstra)                                            |
